concerns: Missing ADR: CLAUDE.md requires architectural changes to add/update docs in docs/adr/. No step creates an ADR for the cathedral geometry builder pattern.
Step 6 should delete createPlaceholderMesh.ts outright instead of marking it @deprecated. CLAUDE.md discourages keeping dead code with backwards-compatibility annotations.
Step 3 over-extracts sceneParamsChanged into its own file. A 3-line shallow equality check should be inlined in rebuildCathedral.ts or initRenderer.ts, not given a dedicated module.

Step 7 assumes subscription callbacks exist in main.ts for wiring renderer.update(), but current main.ts has void renderer as a placeholder. The plan should be explicit about the actual integration point where mapSnapshotToScene is called.
